description: A two-panel meme based on the freeway-exit format. The top panel shows a green overhead highway sign reading LEFT EXIT 12 with a straight arrow and a curving exit arrow, with large white captions added reading WAITING FOR ICE over the straight arrow and SELF-DEPORTING over the exit arrow. The bottom panel is a still of a blue car swerving off the highway toward the exit ramp in a cloud of tire smoke, captioned ILLEGAL ALIENS.
notable_text: LEFT EXIT 12; WAITING FOR ICE; SELF-DEPORTING; ILLEGAL ALIENS
